summary: Iteration 96: Full verification of 5 feature builds: (1) ChiefMarketingSummary rebuild, (2) PostCMOIntegrationOverlay, (3) useCalibrationState integration_connect flow, (4) Weekly Check-In Calendar (free tier, no TierGate), (5) isDataQuery regex fix. All 15 code-level checks PASS. All 3 isDataQuery regex tests PASS. UI tests confirm login, advisor page, governance sidebar, calendar route, and SoundBoard.

test_results.1_cms_6_sections_present: PASS - All 6 data-testid sections present: business-summary, presence-score, communication-audit, geographic-presence, competitor-intelligence, recommendations
test_results.2_cms_communication_audit_5_categories: PASS - buildCommunicationAudit() returns 5 checks: Value Proposition Clarity, Products & Services Communication, Social Proof & Trust, Pricing Transparency, Call-to-Action Clarity
test_results.3_cms_scorebar_expandable: PASS - Each audit category has <ScoreBar score={c.score} /> + expandable advice in onClick handler (setOpenAudit toggle)
test_results.4_cms_no_hallucination: PASS - business-summary: 'Insufficient website data...' fallback | geographic-presence: 'No location data detected...' | competitor-intelligence: 'No competitor data detected...' | All data-absent messages explicit
test_results.5_postcmo_overlay_exists: PASS - PostCMOIntegrationOverlay.js exists with data-testid='post-cmo-integration-overlay', 6 provider buttons: gmail, outlook, yahoo, icloud, exchange, other (each with data-testid=connect-{id})
test_results.6_handleConfirmWow_integration_connect: PASS - Line 464 in useCalibrationState.js: setEntry('integration_connect') after fetchIntelligence(). Not 'intelligence-first'.
test_results.10_weekly_checkin_in_governance: PASS - Line 206 in DashboardLayout.js: { icon: Bell, label: 'Weekly Check-In', path: '/calendar' } in governance section (id='governance', label='Governance & Legal')
test_results.12_calendar_no_tiergate: PASS - App.js line 258: <Route path='/calendar' element={<ProtectedRoute><CalendarView /></ProtectedRoute>}> - NO TierGate wrapper
test_results.13_isDataQuery_regex_not_keyword: PASS - SoundboardPanel.js lines 15-22: DATA_QUERY_PATTERNS is regex array (6 patterns), not keyword array. isDataQuery() calls .some(pattern => pattern.test(lower))
test_results.14_isDataQuery_campos_coffee_false: PASS - isDataQuery('Campos Coffee needs to grow revenue by 30%') = false (NOT intercepted - strategic question)
test_results.15_isDataQuery_pipeline_true: PASS - isDataQuery('show me my pipeline') = true (correctly intercepted - explicit data retrieval)
test_results.16_isDataQuery_growth_false: PASS - isDataQuery('what growth opportunities exist') = false (NOT intercepted - strategic question)
test_results.17_homepage_loads: PASS - Homepage renders BIQc landing page, no JS errors detected
test_results.18_login_trent_test1: PASS - trent-test1@biqc-test.com logs in successfully, redirects to /advisor
test_results.19_advisor_page_campos_data: PASS - Advisor page shows Campos Coffee business data (Business Stability score 75, Market data)
test_results.20_super_admin_sidebar: PASS - ADMIN section visible in sidebar confirming super_admin access
test_results.21_soundboard_visible: PASS - SoundBoard panel visible on /advisor with 'Ask anything...' input
test_results.22_governance_weekly_checkin_ui: PASS - 'Weekly Check-In' text confirmed in sidebar Governance section via UI test
test_results.23_calendar_no_tiergate_ui: PASS - /calendar route loads at /calendar URL (no redirect to /subscribe)

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: ChiefMarketingSummary.js is a complete rebuild with 6 well-structured sections, proper data-testid attributes on all sections and CTA button. No hallucination — all empty-data states have explicit 'Not detected' / 'No data' messages.

GOOD: PostCMOIntegrationOverlay.js has full-screen overlay (fixed inset-0 z-[2000]), 6 provider buttons with data-testid, skip/complete callbacks both navigate to 'intelligence-first'. Visual polish with animations and hover states.

GOOD: handleConfirmWow in useCalibrationState.js correctly sets entry='integration_connect' (line 464) not 'intelligence-first'. fetchIntelligence() is called just before setEntry so data loading starts early.
GOOD: CalibrationAdvisor.js correctly renders PostCMOIntegrationOverlay for entry='integration_connect' and wires onSkip/onComplete to setEntry('intelligence-first').
GOOD: tierResolver.js line 43 sets '/calendar': 'free'. App.js line 258 has no TierGate on /calendar. Governance sidebar item confirmed present.
GOOD: isDataQuery uses regex array — all 3 test cases pass: strategic questions with 'revenue' keyword NOT intercepted, explicit data queries correctly intercepted.
MINOR: PostCMOIntegrationOverlay onComplete calls navigate('/market') if onComplete prop is null — but CalibrationAdvisor always passes onComplete, so this is fine. No risk.
MINOR: SoundBoard welcome message says 'Strategic Intelligence Advisor' (line 78) — matches persona requirement from review request. Previous iteration noted this needed to be checked.

test_credentials.note: Successfully logs in, confirmed super_admin role (ADMIN section in sidebar), Campos Coffee data populated

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 feature builds from iteration 96 verified PASS. Code-level + regex + UI tests all pass. Key flows confirmed: (1) ChiefMarketingSummary 6 sections all have data-testid. (2) PostCMOIntegrationOverlay renders after CMO confirm. (3) handleConfirmWow sets entry='integration_connect'. (4) Weekly Check-In is in Governance sidebar linking to /calendar (free tier, no TierGate). (5) isDataQuery regex correctly blocks strategic questions from being routed to integration Edge Function. trent-test1@biqc-test.com is confirmed super_admin with Campos Coffee data.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All 5 builds are correctly implemented and verified.
